textByHashes.260d002a4233c86e01263ed4406d55bd6f0cabf6: Oh! Sorry, sailor, I didn't see you there. My name is Gwyna. It's nice to meet you.
textByHashes.37f5a3a7b6d71a7fd429646c046aa9a55939c37e: What a delightful name for a boat.
textByHashes.2f97372d6be4d078a0c9c4243c6c1e49e9cef5e8: I was singing for those who perished here. What surrounds you are the remains of hundreds of elven vessels which were destroyed during the Siege of Prifddinas.
textByHashes.94a3a496b85344003c2017c674bef068806e5286: Their remains are scattered across the waters here, creating what sailors refer to as the crystal-flecked waters.
textByHashes.4749a07cf5fad494675e74a07deca0071a622786: You've no need to feel sad here, adventurer. This is where we honour the dead by singing songs to remember them.
textByHashes.05f1538e6c1ebb4b84cffe7a4f4209b22c80672b: That's the main objective of this Barracuda Trial, the Gwenith Glide.
textByHashes.f51306d306d24cfe62d047c04d72f7ec8f5cee6f: Well, unfortunately I don't think you have the Sailing experience needed to attempt this trial. I'd suggest sailing elsewhere until you are ready.
textByHashes.30642068ee74b918aea9c2186d903f88d95d4c5a: The objective of this trial is to imbue large crystals dedicated to the different elven clans. You do that by sailing through portals linked to them. To get started, head out into the course in search of the portals.
textByHashes.dfbf9dd4ff4c2dab043dc2a6764d96929bc10cab: While you're out there, keep an eye out for any lost supplies. You'll need to collect all of them to complete the trial.
textByHashes.5db1cbd666ab630d613cff32bcb27e3e4b8dbcb8: The portals you're looking for are found next to the large crystals. Once you find one, just sail right through it. As you do, the portal will teleport you elsewhere in the crystal-flecked waters.
textByHashes.76ee03937677322617f033ac43d37b5b4c33502e: After being teleported, you'll need to find a second portal to return to the trial area near me, ideally corresponding to the one you went through. The portal you choose to return through determines which crystal
textByHashes.c67d536dc2af761ae7006ff0063f7bfd652217ec: As you sail around, you'll find crystal motes all across the crystal-flecked waters. If your boat is kitted out with an activated wind catcher, you'll be able to turn their energy into wind motes, allowing you to go even
textByHashes.525ccf3c5b53ba9c0370dda9162e48baf4be7c2c: In order to complete the trial, a specific number of crystals will need to be imbued. Each one is imbued in the same way - by traversing the portal linked to it.
textByHashes.5d333465e1079316e3aa38737bcc15cd668110ed: The number of crystals that need imbuing will depend on the rank you're going for. The higher the rank, the more you'll need to imbue.
textByHashes.d559dfc954a98aba5effd610149a38de1bcb7948: This course will truly test your capabilities as a sailor. You'll find yourself alternating between navigating narrow spaces and vast wide open ones with the required speed and grace.
textByHashes.3d1432b95614ca1c497269d3877f8e2fdc445b3d: While navigating the more narrow spaces, you should be wary of resonance crystals. These old ship defence systems can crystallise your helm, damaging those holding it.
textByHashes.a225e7620b39cd82cb77f7d1b38d1f12bf8bdee8: If your helm does get crystallised, you should be able to break the crystals with three swift strikes.
textByHashes.407f3f2812a7c0d5da370a3dc95164983411b474: When using the portals, you'll find that each crystal near me has a pair of them near it. Both will send you to the same location.
textByHashes.4fc9f6b15ddafd6761f9c3607c7a110bfe6b67b1: However, upon using a return portal, your arrival location will depend on which portal you first picked. Choosing which portals to use and planning ahead of time are critical for overcoming this trial.
textByHashes.536c3a9c8fe7cbe4b4b5fc84aa52d0d0268b9195: If you can imbue all of the crystals and collect all the lost supplies in the time given, you'll be awarded a Barracuda rank. Each trial has three ranks: Swordfish, Shark or Marlin. Each rank is harder than the last.
textByHashes.9ff541b2e0bb81af5a3d19f5c8cac0d90b84eae1: For this trial you'll be asked to imbue additional crystals and collect even more lost supplies as the rank increases.
textByHashes.174f24e37b50db8963b2d9e994a814c250a9148e: You can't attempt the next rank until you beat the one before it. You can also try unranked if you'd like to warm up beforehand.
textByHashes.60a7d827d2cdf9b4d79349a96b24d6500418267e: Of course, that's why I'm here.
textByHashes.857c4c2f52d68bc2d66351de6b13966c530a08cc: To start, traversing the portals will reward your boat with an incredible burst of speed, so use that to your advantage.
textByHashes.0e451c2e7c377c531cc2a9fa99de8a16cd365771: Additionally, be aware that the portals will both displace your boat and change which direction it is headed for.
textByHashes.5a32fec250c98e0eacd871566cf21d586e4dd62e: Aligning yourself properly before going through is not required, but you should try to anticipate where you'll end up and react quickly.
textByHashes.27646e1cb1e04e4fe31c6b9845f2061481a0b2f2: Next, avoid the resonance crystals in the area. They will target the helm of your boat. If you do get hit by them, make sure to break the crystals rapidly. Doing so will grant your boat a small speed boost.
textByHashes.933373b3ff42f91c8e697dbe8e82879e1b5ad9ea: Another thing to look out for are the crystal motes. If you have a wind catcher or gale catcher activated on your boat, they will be converted into wind motes and charge it up for you.
textByHashes.1d6eaf3fae8d056f450df56e13f2021243df266b: If you don't have a wind catcher, I'd suggest attempting the Jubbly Jive trial over in Backwater.
textByHashes.25fae744ef5c34b00b14fe6516310eae04fb34ed: Finally, keep your sails trimmed and try not to get lost out there. The portals can be disorientating at first, but I'm sure you'll learn the layout of the course over time.
textByHashes.987d2b3e0e2c0572bf831d6478f6243324508f18: Certainly. The large crystals you see around us are actually remnants of large ships that were destroyed during the Siege of Prifddinas.
textByHashes.6bc1b496caad7f9f4b76091691932e4c1378e9db: Elven ships are not constructed from wood and metal, but are instead sung and woven into life over many moons from extraordinarily rare crystal seeds.
textByHashes.fbd9ace62672894e043f726a29fb1cbf3ce07599: The process is incredibly intimate and time consuming. Each ship created represents not just our goddess, but also the individual who brought it into existence.
textByHashes.c966fed93909e75f9c4ddbab276052b4a295ddc3: Like all Barracuda Trials, the Gwenith Glide exists to push your sailing skills to the limit. However, it also acts as an opportunity to honour not just those that died here, but also the ships themselves.
textByHashes.ed1ca0c5291abb466c90e4e34ce4b3e115ceb8fa: My name is Gwyna of the Hefin Clan. I'm a trial master for the Barracudas and I provide guidance and counsel to those who attempt this trial, the Gwenith Glide.
textByHashes.e273aad61117fd008dfe3f308b551d71e6b0b010: It is my job to see that those who died here are honoured and that the sanctity of the course is upheld.
textByHashes.3a0638b01fe04b47f599993c8d55af62f902e5c2: I appreciate your concern, but you need not worry. Respect for the dead can be upheld in many ways. All who take on the trial have my blessing to proceed as they wish.
textByHashes.90ea5c16836232c901777c864d47db5cd6407fc5: The organisation is a collection of like-minded individuals interested in furthering their own expertise and knowledge of sailing.
textByHashes.153f0ce5a3ede89a55fe488e81cd382a8170e4e4: We're open to all with the spirit and patience to learn this delicate and precise skill.
textByHashes.4464cb3a75e2c82ece26331bee6d03f10c301c7d: Of course you can, but you'll have to prove yourself first. There are other trial masters like me across the seas. You'll need to overcome our trials to earn your place among us.
